title: Tokenized stocks on-chain value surpasses $1 billion, with Ondo Finance and Backed Finance's xStocks platform dominating market share
message_html: Tokenized stocks on-chain value surpasses $1 billion, with Ondo Finance and Backed Finance's xStocks platform dominating market share ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): RWA xyz data shows that the total on-chain value of tokenized stocks has surpassed $1 billion. Ondo Finance and Backed Finance's xStocks platform dominate the majority of tokenized stock issuance and trading market share, with Ondo Finance accounting for approximately
